text.title: Interface Analysis Core Rules
text.summary: Five testable rules every interface-analysis cycle enforces.

rule.statement: Every interface carries a machine-readable contract: OpenAPI 3.x for HTTP, AsyncAPI for messaging, JSON Schema or Avro for files. Free-text payload descriptions are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Untyped contracts cause silent payload drift; typed contracts surface breakage at lint time.

rule.statement: Every interface has a NAMED owner (full name + role) on each side. Anonymous owners block the inventory.
rule.rationale: Anonymous interface ownership produces zombie endpoints nobody updates and silent breakage.

rule.statement: Error semantics are declared: error_codes[] (HTTP status / error_code mapping), retry_policy, idempotency_key shape. Cells empty for any field fail the cycle.
rule.rationale: Missing error contracts cause downstream teams to invent ad-hoc retry behavior that amplifies incidents.

rule.statement: SLA declares latency_p95_ms, availability_pct, throughput_rps, and a clear degradation policy. SLAs without all four are not SLAs.

rationale.source: SRE / Google SRE Book Ch.4 SLOs

rule.rationale: Partial SLAs hide consumer expectations; explicit p95+availability+throughput+degradation tightens the contract.

rule.statement: Interface is versioned (semver in URL path or header) and links to test-fixture set (happy + 1+ failure per error code).

rationale.source: API evolution / Zalando RESTful API Guidelines

rule.rationale: Unversioned interfaces break consumers without warning; missing fixtures mean drift goes undetected.

example.title: Interface entry satisfying r1+r3
example.code: id: payment-webhook protocol: http-webhook contract: type: openapi-3.1 ref: contracts/payment-webhook.yaml#/paths/~1webhook/post error_codes: - {http: 400, code: invalid_signature, retry: false} - {http: 409, code: duplicate_event, retry: false} - {http: 500, code: internal_error, retry: true, backoff: exponential} retry_policy: max_attempts=3, base=1s idempotency_key: header X-Idempotency-Key (uuid v4)
example.note: Typed contract; error codes; retry semantics; idempotency.

example.title: Failure of r1
example.code: id: payment-webhook protocol: http payload: "JSON object with payment details"
example.note: Free-text payload; no contract ref; no error semantics.
